attacking_style: Opportunistic late attacks (1km to go) on steep finishing ramps, targeting visible weakness in rivals. Shows ability to win from long breakaways and short explosive moves on uphill finishes.
team_tactics: Operates with significant autonomy, even attacking teammates for bonuses. Limited evidence of structured team support; appears to race independently with aggressive GC priority overriding stage hierarchies.
terrain_preference: Steep finishing ramps and punchy uphill sprints where power can be decisive. Capable on Cat-1 climbs with resilience to contest finishes after day-long efforts. Excels when gradients create selection.
vulnerability: Unknown sustainability against dedicated GC teams with organized tempo control. Limited observations of how he handles tactical isolation when team support is needed.
key_patterns: Attacks teammates for time bonuses and intermediate sprints when GC opportunity exists (2 instances)
Reads race situations opportunistically, exploiting visible rival weakness rather than predetermined tactics (2+ instances)
Wins uphill sprints from breakaways, showing both climbing endurance and final kick (3 instances)
Demonstrates tactical maturity beyond age: refuses work when tactically sound, attacks at optimal moments (3 instances)
Repeatedly splits peloton on climbs to reduce final competition before sprint finishes (2 instances)
form_trajectory: positive: 2021 Poland stage win with yellow jersey capture shows progression from 2019-2020 breakaway specialist to GC threat capable of isolating established leaders
